title: Territory Manager Surgical
description:
**Location:** Bologna or proximity, covering Central Italy and Sicily


The Surgical division of Edwards Lifesciences is a global leader in surgical structural heart solutions, focused on innovative valve technologies supported by strong clinical evidence. Edwards partners closely with cardiac surgeons to improve patient outcomes and quality of life.  

  



The Territory Managers manages the relationship with a defined list of key Edwards customers, with the objective of growing Edwards’ share of wallet. Drives business growth by identifying, developing and closing sales opportunities within the assigned portfolio.


**How you will make an impact:**

• Serves as the primary point of contact for the assigned customer base within the business unit, leveraging strong knowledge of cardiovascular anatomy, pathology and physiology relevant to EW Surgical products


• Builds and maintains strong, long\-term relationships with customers, surgeons, referrers and other key stakeholders within the assigned region to strengthen Edwards’ market positioning


• Drives growth within existing accounts by identifying opportunities, addressing gaps and executing sales strategies to achieve regional targets


• Develops and executes annual account and territory plans in line with regional objectives


• Performs other incidental duties as required


**What you will need:**

Bachelor’s degree in biomedical engineering or a related scientific field, with a minimum of 5 years of prior experience in the medical devices industry required


**What else we look for:**

* Excellent knowledge of English, both written and spoken
* Willingness and ability to travel frequently within the assigned territory
* Strong knowledge of own products as well as competitor offering
* Solid understanding of customer organizations, healthcare systems and market dynamics
* Proven ability to assess customer needs, address objections and clearly articulate product value
* Strong influencing, negotiation and relationship\-building skills
* Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast\-paced environment
* High attention to detail
* Compliance with all company policies and procedures, including Environmental Health \& Safety requirements

**What is it like to work at Edwards Lifesciences in Italy?**

As a global leader in patient\-focused medical innovations, we offer rewarding opportunities and exciting challenges in a truly international, dynamic and friendly work environment.


We are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive work environment where all employees can grow, personally and professionally. To achieve this, we offer on\-the\-job development, training opportunities and the support and guidance provided by dedicated employee groups (the Edwards Network of Women, Edwards Foundation charity team, sustainability activities, and others).


Edwards Lifesciences in Italy also offers the following benefits:


* Competitive compensation and benefits package
* Flexible working hours, remote working
* Life Insurance
* Accidental Death \& Disability Insurance
* Telemedical Services
* Meal vouchers
* Service Awards
* Employee Stock Purchase Programme
* Employee Assistance Programme
* Comprehensive Wellness programme including preventive cardiovascular screening, educational events, on\-site fitness center, lessons with personal trainer, fruit in the office, charity activities and much more.

Benefits are regulated by an internal policy which contains the full details regarding the entitlement and conditions for the benefits. Benefits Policy and components may vary by location.


**What is it like to work at Edwards Lifesciences in Italy?**

As a global leader in patient\-focused medical innovations, we offer rewarding opportunities and exciting challenges in a truly international, dynamic and friendly work environment.


We are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive work environment where all employees can grow, personally and professionally. (Certified for ISO30415 D\&I)


To achieve this, we offer on\-the\-job development, training opportunities and the support and guidance provided by dedicated employee groups (the Edwards Network of Women, Edwards Foundation charity team, sustainability activities, and others).  



Edwards Lifesciences in Italy also offers the following benefits:


* Competitive compensation and benefits package
* Flexible working hours, remote working
* Life Insurance
* Accidental Death \& Disability Insurance
* Telemedical Services
* Meal vouchers
* Service Awards
* Employee Stock Purchase Programme
* Employee Assistance Programme
* Comprehensive Wellness programme including preventive cardiovascular screening, educational events, on\-site fitness center, lessons with personal trainer, fruit in the office, charity activities and much more.

Benefits are regulated by an internal policy which contains the full details regarding the entitlement and conditions for the benefits. Benefits policy and components may vary by location.
company_description: Edwards Lifesciences (NYSE: EW), is the global leader of patient-focused medical innovations for structural heart disease and critical care monitoring.

title: Electrophysiology Field Clinical Specialist Graduate- Bologna (Italy).
Software Test Engineer
description:
As a global medtech company, we are driven by our Vision of changing the trajectory of lives for a new day and our Mission to create ingenious solutions that ignite patient turnarounds. Our relentless commitment to patients and strong legacy of innovation in healthcare are the foundation of our future. If you're looking for a new chance, a new beginning, a new trajectory, LivaNova is where your talent can truly thrive. Join our talented team members worldwide to become a pioneer of tomorrow—because at LivaNova, we don’t just treat conditions — we aspire to alter the course of lives.
.
Position Summary:
The Software Test Engineer is responsible for verifying the functionality, performance,  

and safety of PDM software applications in compliance with medical device regulations and  

internal quality standards.
In his/her role, the Software Test Engineer is responsible for:* Analyze software requirements and specifications for testability and provide feedback to improve their clarity and completeness
* Define and document test scenarios and cases aligned with software requirements and system functionalities
* Design and execute verification test protocols and document results
* Maintain traceability between requirements, test cases, and test results
* Identify, document, and track software anomalies and support root cause analysis
* Contribute to the definition of test strategies for complex features, including the identification of required test environments, tools, and interfaced systems
* Collaborate closely with developers, system engineers, and product teams to ensure complete and accurate verification coverage
* Report testing activities, results and anomalies using tools such as Azure DevOps


The following skills shall characterize an adequate profile:* 3\+ years of experience in software testing for desktop applications and complex, distributed systems, ideally in regulated environments such as healthcare or medical devices
* Strong knowledge of software requirements engineering, with the ability to review, validate, trace, and contribute to high\-quality specifications
* Proven track record of creating and maintaining comprehensive test plans, test cases, and traceability matrices covering functional, non\-functional, UI, integration, and regression testing
* Experience using Azure DevOps, JIRA, or similar platforms for test planning, execution, defect tracking, and continuous integration
* Skilled in analyzing application logs, network traces (Wireshark/Fiddler), and system event logs to support root cause analysis and fast issue resolution
* Working knowledge of SQL Server, including writing and executing complex T\-SQL queries for data validation, test data preparation, and backend testing
* Experience in test data anonymization, HIPAA/GDPR considerations, and working with PHI (Protected Health Information)
* hands\-on experience in medical device software verification, including standards like IEC 62304, ISO 14971, ISO 13485, and FDA 21 CFR Part 11
* Experience working in Agile and hybrid environments, contributing to sprint testing, risk\-based testing, and DevOps pipelines
* Bonus: familiarity with HL7, FHIR, DICOM, or other healthcare\-specific data standards
* Fluent English
* Passionate for working in a multicultural environment and with strong commitment and orientation to the results
* Master’s degree in Computer Science, Biomedical Engineering, Software Engineering, or equivalent technical discipline
* ISTQB Foundation level

  

Travel Requirements: 10 %
Welcome to impact. Welcome to innovation. Welcome to your new life.
company_description: From engineers to digital specialists, LivaNova employees around the world enjoy medical device careers that challenge them professionally while fulfilling their sense of purpose.

title: Operatore Contact Center a Reggio Emilia
description:
Italiassistenza Spa è l’Home Care Company del Gruppo Zambon che supporta i pazienti con malattie croniche o rare nel loro percorso di cura e aderenza terapeutica.
  
  

In particolare, siamo leader nella progettazione, nella gestione e nel monitoraggio dei Patient Support Programs (PSP), servizi attivati e finanziati dalle aziende farmaceutiche che si integrano con quelli erogati dal SSN, migliorando la qualità dei processi assistenziali senza pesare sul servizio pubblico.
  
  

Dalle nostre sedi di Milano, Reggio Emilia e Lugano coordiniamo una rete capillare di medici, infermieri e centri di assistenza domiciliare per aiutare i pazienti a seguire le terapie, dando loro tutto il sostegno di cui hanno bisogno.
  
  

Grazie ai nostri programmi personalizzati, aumentiamo i livelli di aderenza terapeutica fino al 90%.
  
  

Da oltre 30 anni Italiassistenza opera anche nel campo dell’assistenza domiciliare privata con il marchio Privatassistenza, attraverso 200 centri, attivi tutti i giorni, 24 ore su 24\.
  
  

Migliorare la qualità di vita dei nostri pazienti e delle loro famiglie è la nostra mission quotidiana. La qualità dei nostri servizi e la professionalità dei nostri operatori sono i princìpi a cui ci ispiriamo.
  
  

Stiamo ricercando operatori per il potenziamento delle nostre Centrali Operative. Sei energico e appassionato? Candidati e avrai l'opportunità di supportarci nell’erogazione dei Patient Support Program (PSP) attraverso l'organizzazione di un sistema strutturato di servizi domiciliari e telefonici per rispondere alle esigenze del Paziente durante il suo percorso terapeutico
  
  

**Operatore Contact Center a Reggio Emilia:**  

**Ruolo e responsabilità:**  

* Erogare tutte le prestazioni previste dai Programmi di Supporto al Paziente SP (ad esempio on\-boarding medico e paziente, accessi domiciliari, training virtuali ecc.) curandone gli aspetti logistici e organizzativi, e interagendo con tutti gli attori coinvolti nel processo (pazienti, medici, operatori sanitari, farmacie, provider logistici)
* Fornire assistenza tecnica professionale al paziente e la sua famiglia, con l’obiettivo di migliorare l’aderenza alla terapia e la qualità della vita
* Raccogliere le eventuali segnalazioni di farmacovigilanza e/o reclami di prodotto
* Gestire Call Inbound per gestione problematiche varie e supporto tecnico, informazioni sui servizi, FAQ, rischedulazione servizi
* Eseguire Call Outbound: reminder terapia, monitoraggio periodico, questionari, questionari personalizzati
* Turni h24 e festivi


**Competenze:**  

* Capacità di comunicare efficacemente al telefono
* Esperienza pregressa di gestione clienti , preferibilmente nell’ambito di centrali operative nel settore sanitario
* Attitudine al problem solving
* Entusiasmo, flessibilità, ottimale gestione dello stress
* Ottima conoscenza del pacchetto Office


**Requisiti:**  

* esperienza pregressa maturata in Assistenziale / Contact Center (preferibilmente settore sanitario)
* buona capacità di utilizzo di strumenti informatici e CRM


**Contratto di lavoro:** Tempo determinato
  
  

**Orario:** Turni

title: Senior Process Development Engineer
description:
**Job Description:**


POSITION SUMMARY


We are seeking an experienced engineer to develop and industrialize robust manufacturing processes for TransMedics’ innovative disposable medical device systems that support life\-saving organ transplant technologies. This role partners closely with R\&D, Advanced Manufacturing, and key stakeholders to ensure seamless transition from concept and prototyping through scalable production, ensuring process reliability and product quality. This individual will play a critical role in advancing breakthrough technologies that improve patient outcomes worldwide through technical rigor, innovation, and operational excellence.


RESPONSIBILITIES


This position is responsible for, but not limited to, the following:

* Responsible for the development of manufacturing processes involved in New Product Development of disposable systems, sharing the vision with the VP of Disposables Development and the main stakeholders.
* Ensure Robust Design of TMDX Disposables devices creating Robust manufacturing processes, taking part to design, prototyping and testing activities and being responsible for an extremely accurate and detailed analysis based on an initial limited number of data obtained from the prototyping phase, finally moving to the transfer of design to Manufacturing.
* Work intensively with R\&D members (e.g. mechanical, prototyping and test engineers) and Advanced Manufacturing engineers, applying technical and engineering skills to ensure design for manufacturability.
* Define technical specifications aimed to the realization of equipment for prototyping, testing and manufacturing, in cooperation with internal stakeholders and external suppliers.
* Define test methods and protocols for the characterization of the technical features and the CTQ.
* Transform the prototyping phases into physical / technical parameters leading to the definition of manufacturing processes and production recipes.
* Apply the expertise developed in devices manufacturing to investigate physical failures through reverse engineering, autopsies of devices, measurements and inspections using either destructive or nondestructive methods.
* Perform other TransMedics tasks and duties as assigned/required.

MANAGEMENT RESPONSIBILITIES

* This position will not have management responsibilities.


PHYSICAL ATTRIBUTES

* No Physical attributes

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS

* Broad technical experience in biomedical device environment, manufacturing processes and equipment of disposables, polymeric, testing and characterization methods, measurement systems;
* 7\+ years of experience in medical devices;
* Degree in mechanical / mechatronic / biomedical / physics engineering or equivalent;
* Deep knowledge of statistics;
* Ability to bring disruptive medical technologies from concept to commercialization
* Knowledge of statistics
* Proven track record leading technical teams to successful product launches
* Ability to work in an international environment
* Highly motivated to enhance products, techniques and consequently the life of the patients
* Excellent communication skills in English; Italian language skills preferred
* Good knowledge of Microsoft Office suite;
* Willingness to relocate to Mirandola, Italy

***Every Organ Wasted is a Life Not Saved.***


TransMedics, Inc. is a commercial\-stage medical technology company transforming organ transplant therapy for patients worldwide. Our mission is to help save more patients’ lives by increasing access to viable donor organs for those who are awaiting an organ transplant. To accomplish this mission, we partner closely with transplant stakeholders worldwide and help expand their access to healthy donor organs, while delivering the highest quality technology, service, clinical care and outcomes.


Driven by a passion for improving patient care, we make the impossible possible and keep our employees at the center of everything we do. Together, we strive to enhance the quality of life for transplant recipients and their families, fostering hope and healing in the journey toward better health.

**Maximize your potential at TransMedics, Inc.**


www.TransMedics.com


TransMedics is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, national origin, marital status, age, disability or protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.
company_description: TransMedics is a publicly traded, medical technology company revolutionizing what’s possible in organ transplant through innovation, collaboration, and commitment.

title: Principal Mechanical Design Engineer (with CAD Expertise)
description:
**Job Description:**


POSITION SUMMARY


Develop and optimize mechanical design of the disposables components and systems for TransMedics' Organ Care System (OCS™) using advanced CAD modeling. Design products and solutions, and verify them through appropriate simulation tools and testing, defining and executing the appropriate test protocols. Design components of TransMedics' Organ Care System (OCS™) while taking care of all the aspects related to the mechanical design and the manufacturability of the system and subsystems.


This specialized role focuses on ensuring optimal product design and manufacturability through engineering analysis.


RESPONSIBILITIES


This position is responsible for, but not limited to, the following:

* Responsible for product design, transforming ideas into concept design and defining technical solutions of Transmedics products
* Perform CAD design and FEM simulations to analyze and optimize the components
* Oversee the overall picture of the entire device and coordinates the activities of internal and external CAD designers
* Design components and systems for optimal product design and manufacturability using advanced CAD tools
* Analyze the key parameters impacting the performances of the devices and the manufacturing properties in general
* Develop and validate computational models for organ perfusion systems
* Collaborate with other engineers to incorporate CAD and FEM analysis results into product designs
* Support verification testing and correlate with simulation results
* Document simulation methodologies and results for design history files
* Develop design recommendations based on CAD\-FEM analysis outcomes
* Design the components and the final products with a keen eye on the details impacting the critical characteristics of the device and the manufacturability
* Perform other TransMedics tasks and duties as assigned/required.

MANAGEMENT RESPONSIBILITIES

* This position will not have management responsibilities.


PHYSICAL ATTRIBUTES

* Standard engineering working environment.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS

* Master's degree or PhD in Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, or related field or high school diploma with extensive experience in the same role
* 15\+ years experience with CAD and FEM simulation for medical devices or similar applications
* Strong CAD modeling skills (SolidWorks is preferred)
* Knowledge of subsystems used in medical devices
* Experience validating CAD models with experimental data
* Excellent analytical and problem\-solving skills
* Good communication skills in English; Italian language skills preferred
* Ability to work in an international environment
* Highly motivated to enhance the products, the techniques and consequently the life of the patients
* Good knowledge of Microsoft Office suite;
* Willingness to relocate to Mirandola, Italy

***Every Organ Wasted is a Life Not Saved.***


TransMedics, Inc. is a commercial\-stage medical technology company transforming organ transplant therapy for patients worldwide. Our mission is to help save more patients’ lives by increasing access to viable donor organs for those who are awaiting an organ transplant. To accomplish this mission, we partner closely with transplant stakeholders worldwide and help expand their access to healthy donor organs, while delivering the highest quality technology, service, clinical care and outcomes.


Driven by a passion for improving patient care, we make the impossible possible and keep our employees at the center of everything we do. Together, we strive to enhance the quality of life for transplant recipients and their families, fostering hope and healing in the journey toward better health.

**Maximize your potential at TransMedics, Inc.**


www.TransMedics.com


TransMedics is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, national origin, marital status, age, disability or protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.
